practice.deck_lead: Each deck is a TOPIK level. Shuffle, draw 3 cards and write 9 sentences. 화이팅! 💪
practice.deck_tap_hint: Tap the cards to reveal your hand
practice.deck_all_revealed: Hand complete — all 3 cards are revealed.
practice.error_note_placeholder: e.g. unsure whether to use 이 or 가...
practice.completion_text: 9 sentences saved — 3 grammar × 3 contexts. Draw another hand?
practice.no_grammars: Not enough grammar items in the active decks.
practice.no_contexts: You need at least 3 active contexts.

library.lead: All the grammar points that can show up in your card draws. Each one grows as you practice.

coming_soon.audio: Pronunciation audio is coming soon. 화이팅!
coming_soon.examples: More example sentences are coming soon.
coming_soon.achievements: Achievements you can earn with this grammar are coming soon.
coming_soon.usage_notes: Detailed usage notes for this grammar are coming soon.

empty.garden: The Garden map (Stardew-style 2D map with TOPIK zones and your grammar plants growing) ships in a later plan. Meanwhile, head to Practice to start cultivating.
empty.stats: Detailed stats land in a later plan.
empty.log: No sentences yet. Head to Practice.
empty.settings: Account settings and customization land in later plans.

auth.magic_link_sent: Check your email for the sign-in link.
auth.callback_error: Sign-in link is invalid or expired.

dialog.intro_day: Welcome to the garden. The sun is up; the grammar grows.
dialog.intro_night: The sky is purple. The grammar still grows. 화이팅.
dialog.email: Whisper your e-mail to the gatekeeper.
dialog.magic: A scroll will be sent by carrier owl.
dialog.error_oauth: That gateway is closed. Try another door.

garden.tree_locked: Reach {pct}% in level {n} to plant this tree

weather.rain_hint: Review your tricky sentences to clear the sky

games.lead: Pick your practice mode. Each game grows your Korean in a different way.

ruleta.name: The Deck
ruleta.desc: Pick your TOPIK deck, shuffle and draw 3 cards. Write 9 creative sentences.

escape.name: Escape Room
escape.desc: Solve grammar puzzles to escape little Korean stories.

third.desc: A third game is sprouting in the greenhouse…

escape.book_lead: Flip through the notebook and pick your story.
escape.game_over_text: Three stumbles. The door locks again — but the house remembers you. Try again with fresh notes.
escape.creation_help: Tap the tiles in order to build the sentence
